code:
type BankError =
  | Overdraft

data BankAccount
  mut balance: Int
end

fn deposit(_ account: BankAccount, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Unit, BankError>
  mut acc = account
  acc.balance = acc.balance + amount
  Ok(())
end

fn withdraw(_ account: BankAccount, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Unit, BankError>
  if amount > account.balance
    Err(BankError.Overdraft)
  else
    mut acc = account
    acc.balance = acc.balance - amount
    Ok(())
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let account = BankAccount(balance: 100)

  deposit(account, 50)
  withdraw(account, 30)
  let last_result = withdraw(account, 500)

  let status = match last_result
  when Ok(_)
    "ok"
  when Err(_)
    "overdraft"
  end

  print("final_balance=#{account.balance}")
  print("last_status=#{status}")
end
